name: Reliant Transportation
registry_source: Alaska Division of Corporations not directly accessed; press/job listings confirm active operations
notes: Anchorage school-bus operation is a subsidiary of MV Transportation (Dallas, TX); referred to in job postings as 'MV/Reliant Transportation'. Likely operates under MV Transportation Inc USDOT 975853 (Dallas, TX) rather than a standalone Reliant Alaska USDOT. Multiple FMCSA SAFER hits for 'Reliant Transportation' all map to unrelated entities (NE freight broker DOT 836639, TN DOT 2801377, KY DOT 4200313). No Anchorage-specific USDOT found. Contracted by Anchorage School District for ~153/two-thirds of routes; ~250+ school buses estimated under MV/Reliant Anchorage operation per district reporting. Buzzfile lists ~7 years in operation (founded ~2017-2018).

name: Five Star Transport
carrier_operation: Interstate; Private passenger (business); not authorized for-hire
registry_source: Massachusetts Secretary of the Commonwealth Corporations Division (corp.sec.state.ma.us); BBB profile; D&B; company website fivestarbus.com
notes: Legal name FIVE STAR TRANSPORTATION INC, DBA 'Five Star Bus'. Power units of 98 in MCS-150 reflects DOT-registered fleet; company self-reports 250+ school buses across 7 terminals in W MA + Cape Cod. Family-run since 1989; Lecrenski brothers bought from mother in 2013. Now part of Student Transportation of America (STA) family. Compliance review 09/24/2010 (Satisfactory). MCS-150 dated 01/15/2026; 4,116,000 miles reported 2025. Address matches input.

name: Birnie Bus Svc Inc
carrier_operation: Intrastate Only (Non-HM); not authorized for-hire interstate
registry_source: New York Department of State Corporation/Business Entity Database; BBB profile (Rome NY); company website birniebus.com
notes: Founded 10/18/1947 by Martin K. Birnie and Martin J. Nunn; officially incorporated 1960. Address in input (1724 Middle River Dr, Fort Lauderdale FL) corresponds to STA Inc HQ — NOT a Birnie operating address; FMCSA/BBB confirm Rome NY HQ. Acquired by Krapf Bus Cos. of West Chester, PA effective 06/14/2017; subsequently acquired by Student Transportation of America (STA) in January 2025. Company self-reports ~1,000 vehicles and 1,400+ employees across 18 NY locations; FMCSA MCS-150 lists 340 power units / 319 drivers under Birnie Bus Service Inc entity. MCS-150 dated 09/26/2024; 4,952,224 miles 2023. Related entity Birnie Transportation Services Inc DOT 1626907 (inactive).

name: Boston Student Transportation
fmcsa_address: 36 Jaconnet St Ste 106, Newton, MA 02461 (One Call Transport LLC operating address)
registry_source: Massachusetts Secretary of the Commonwealth Corporations Division (entity #001266065); BBB profile (Newton MA); OpenCorporates
notes: Input address '84 State St, Boston MA' is the address of Corporation Service Company (CSC) — a commercial registered agent — not an operating site. 'Boston Student Transportation' is the DBA/web brand (bostonstudenttransport.com) for ONE CALL TRANSPORT LLC, an alternative student transportation provider (sedans/vans for special-needs and out-of-district routes), founded 03/23/2017, principal office 36 Jaconnet St Ste 106, Newton MA. No FMCSA SAFER snapshot confidently maps to this MA entity — One Call Transport LLC USDOT 3058217 is Columbus OH, USDOT 4537091 is Chiefland FL, both unrelated. MA student transport under the FMCSA school-district exemption may not require its own USDOT for intra-district sponsored work. Self-reported fleet ~33 vehicles per website. BBB lists 3 employees (likely admin only; drivers contracted).

name: Midland Columbia Bus Co
carrier_operation: Interstate; Private passenger (business); not authorized for-hire interstate
inc_date: 1956 (school-bus operations launched; corporate Inc date not confirmed in OR SOS via this pass)
registry_source: Oregon Secretary of State Business Registry (sos.oregon.gov); BBB profile (Pendleton OR); D&B; company website midcobus.com
notes: Correct legal name is MID COLUMBIA BUS CO INC (input lists 'Midland Columbia' which is a misspelling). Headquartered Pendleton OR — NOT Dallas OR (input HQ); Dallas OR is just one of many service locations contracted to Dallas School District 2. Started 1956 as bid for Condon School District contract by Bill Flatt; originally a freight/mail hauler (Flatt's Trucking Service) for Union Pacific Railroad. Sold by Flatt family in 2015 to Landmark Student Transportation (Canadian). Operates Oregon, Idaho, Nebraska. 1999 SBF Contractor of the Year. Compliance review 04/22/1987 = Satisfactory. MCS-150 dated 01/12/2026.
